'''''Lament''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] belonging the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The ''Lament'' along with [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] was part of the attack on [[Dunari's Rest|Dunari's Casino]] and was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
